_meta.purpose: Anti-drift registry for stories wrap既有 primitive(Sidebar / ChromeHeader / DataTable / Dialog / Sheet / Popover)— machine-readable canonical archetype。Hook `check_story_invariants.sh R8` reads this(not grep spec.md / not憑 Claude judgment)to enforce nearest same-purpose canonical usage(per codex Layer B D4 2026-05-20)。新增 primitive entry 必先寫 baseline + helper list + antiPatterns regex + variantRules。
consumed_by: .claude/skills/story-writing/SKILL.md#Phase-0.0(load registry + read baseline + produce diff table)
_meta.rollout: ship as warn mode first;確認 zero existing violation → 升 P0 BLOCKER

antiPatterns.rationale: SidebarHeader 必 wrap WorkspaceBrand-like ItemAvatar block(per sidebar.stories#IconCollapse baseline);simplified <span> mock = drift
SidebarMenuButton 必用 startIcon prop + tooltip prop;children inline icon = drift

buttonCanonical.rationale: per codex D2 verdict 2026-05-20 + action-bar.spec.md narrow scope:dense always-visible toolbar = low visual weight + pressed/chips/badges 顯示 state;tertiary 只用 standalone/labeled context

antiPatterns.rationale: DataTable toolbar filter/sort 必 variant=text(per data-table.stories#WithBulkActions L998 canonical)
DataTable toolbar 必 iconOnly(per WithBulkActions L998 canonical),不掛 label
DataTable toolbar filter/sort button 必包在 Popover 內,內含真 DataTableFilterPanel / DataTableSortManager primitive
ChromeHeader title 該用 <h1 className="text-body-lg font-medium"> 緊鄰 SidebarTrigger,不該用 <span flex-1> 撐空間造成 toggle + title 巨大間距
